sentences.arabic: الْحِنَّاءُ نَبَاتٌ يُسْتَخْدَمُ لِرَسْمِ نُقُوشٍ جَمِيلَةٍ عَلَى يَدَيِ الْعَرُوسِ.
sentences.translation: Kana je biljka koja se koristi za crtanje lijepih ukrasa na mladenkinim rukama.
sentences.translationEn: Henna is a plant used to draw beautiful patterns on the bride's hands.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ النِّسَاءُ قَبْلَ الْعُرْسِ لِيَرْسُمْنَ الْحِنَّاءَ وَيُغَنِّينَ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Žene se okupljaju prije vjenčanja da nanose kanu i zajedno pjevaju.
sentences.translationEn: Women gather before the wedding to apply henna and sing together.

sentences.arabic: تَدُومُ نُقُوشُ الْحِنَّاءِ عَلَى الْجِلْدِ أُسْبُوعَيْنِ أَوْ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Ukrasi od kane ostaju na koži dvije sedmice ili više.
sentences.translationEn: Henna patterns last on the skin for two weeks or more.

sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ لَيْلَةُ الْحِنَّاءِ مِنْ أَجْمَلِ لَيَالِي الْأَفْرَاحِ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Noć kane smatra se jednom od najljepših večeri svadbe u arapskom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The henna night is considered one of the most beautiful evenings of the wedding celebrations in the Arab world.
